creator: vd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

It works for me:

/usr/ports/security/rkhunter# make install 
===>  Installing for rkhunter-1.3.6
===>   rkhunter-1.3.6 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.10.1/mach/Digest/SHA1.pm - found
===>   rkhunter-1.3.6 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/wget - not found
===>    Verifying install for /usr/local/bin/wget in /usr/ports/ftp/wget
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
===>  Found saved configuration for wget-1.12
===>  Extracting for wget-1.12_1
=> MD5 Checksum OK for wget-1.12.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for wget-1.12.tar.bz2.
===>   wget-1.12_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.10.1 - found
===>  Patching for wget-1.12_1
===>   wget-1.12_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.10.1 - found
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for wget-1.12_1
/usr/bin/sed -i.bak -e 's,$<,$(srcdir)/wget.texi,'  /usr/ports/ftp/wget/work/wget-1.12/doc/Makefile.in
/usr/bin/sed -i.bak -e 's,/usr/local/etc/wgetrc,/usr/local/etc/wgetrc,'  -e 's,@file{},@file{/usr/local},'  /usr/ports/ftp/wget/work/wget-1.12/doc/sample.wgetrc* /usr/ports/ftp/wget/work/wget-1.12/doc/wget.texi
===>   wget-1.12_1 depends on executable: gmake - found
===>   wget-1.12_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.10.1 - found
===>   wget-1.12_1 depends on shared library: gnutls - found
===>   wget-1.12_1 depends on shared library: intl - found
===>  Configuring for wget-1.12_1
configure: configuring for GNU Wget 1.12
checking for a BSD-compatible install... /usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel
...
===>   Compressing manual pages for rkhunter-1.3.6
===>   Registering installation for rkhunter-1.3.6
/usr/ports/security/rkhunter#

Are you sure your ports tree is not damaged? Can you install ftp/wget
directly?

Thanks!

-- 
Vasil Dimov
moc.elcaro@vomid.lisav        Software Developer @ Oracle/Innobase Oy
gro.DSBeerF@dv                Committer @ FreeBSD.org
gro.d5v@dv                    Home @ Sofia, Bulgaria
